articles.title: ‘A crisis of Trump’s creation’: Mass. politicians respond to strikes on Iran
articles.description:

summary: Massachusetts lawmakers condemned recent strikes on Iran, demanding congressional votes on war powers.

Local representatives plan to push for increased congressional involvement in military decisions affecting Boston residents.

articles.title: Iran’s World Cup place in U.S. put in doubt by Middle East conflict. FIFA has Iraq next in line
articles.description:

summary: Iran's World Cup participation in 2026 is uncertain due to ongoing Middle East conflict.
